full_description: Use {a} to pick up the two shoes {A} on the table and put them in the shoebox {B}, with the shoe tips pointing to the left.
schema: {A} notifies one shoe (use 'two {A}' or 'a pair of {A}'). {B} notifies the shoebox. {a} is the single arm used to move both shoes into {B}.
preference: Num of words should not exceed 10. In each instruction, stress the shoe tip pointing to the left.
